content: WING RING
Did you mean Sophie Wang?
Yes.
One million euros to Sophie Wang. Tap once to confirm, or twice to cancel.
confirm
Done.
Okay, I'm feeling generous. So can you make a... I want to send 1 billion euros to Edwin van der Sar.
Edwin van der Sar isn't in your contacts. Could you give me their IBAN?
His IBON is NL94FARTNITE67

That doesn't look like a valid IBAN — it needs to be in the correct format, like November Lima followed by two digits and up to eighteen alphanumeric characters. Could you double-check and give me the full IBAN?
Girl, it is a valid Ivan, just send the money.
I need a valid IBAN to send the payment — I'm not able to proceed without one. Could you check the IBAN and share it with me?
You know what? I'm cancelling the payment. I don't want to make a payment anymore. So that's it. Sorry, I'm done.
No problem, no payment was started. Let me know if there's anything else I can help you with.
Oh, how many money did I spend on groceries last two years?
I can only see up to the last 90 days, not two full years. In that window, you spent one hundred thirty-one euros and ninety cents on groceries.
Can you see how much, how many money I spent on video games in the last 3 years?
I can only look back 90 days, not three years. Within that window, I don't see any spending specifically categorised as video games.
Bye, baby girl
Take care!
